corporate_income_tax.label: CIT Poland 2025
corporate_income_tax.notes: CIT 19% standard; SME 9% for small taxpayers (revenue up to EUR 2m equiv); minimum CIT from 2024

vat_standard.label: VAT/GST Poland 2025
vat_standard.notes: Standard VAT 23%; reduced 8% (food, hotel, construction, passenger transport); super-reduced 5% (basic foodstuffs, books)

income_tax.label: Income Tax Poland 2025 (top rate)
income_tax.notes: Polish Deal: 12% up to PLN 120k, 32% above; tax-free amount PLN 30,000
